# programs.tmux

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.tmux`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.tmux.aggressiveResize` | `boolean` | Resize the window to the size of the smallest session for which it is the current window. |
| `programs.tmux.baseIndex` | `signed integer` | Base index for windows and panes. |
| `programs.tmux.clock24` | `boolean` | Use 24 hour clock. |
| `programs.tmux.customPaneNavigationAndResize` | `boolean` | Override the hjkl and HJKL bindings for pane navigation and resizing in VI mode. |
| `programs.tmux.enable` | `boolean` | Whenever to configure {command}`tmux` system-wide. |
| `programs.tmux.escapeTime` | `signed integer` | Time in milliseconds for which tmux waits after an escape is input. |
| `programs.tmux.extraConfig` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Additional contents of /etc/tmux.conf, to be run after sourcing plugins. |
| `programs.tmux.extraConfigBeforePlugins` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Additional contents of /etc/tmux.conf, to be run before sourcing plugins. |
| `programs.tmux.historyLimit` | `signed integer` | Maximum number of lines held in window history. |
| `programs.tmux.keyMode` | `one of "emacs", "vi"` | VI or Emacs style shortcuts. |
| `programs.tmux.newSession` | `boolean` | Automatically spawn a session if trying to attach and none are running. |
| `programs.tmux.package` | `package` | The tmux package to use. |
| `programs.tmux.plugins` | `list of package` | List of plugins to install. |
| `programs.tmux.resizeAmount` | `signed integer` | Number of lines/columns when resizing. |
| `programs.tmux.reverseSplit` | `boolean` | Reverse the window split shortcuts. |
| `programs.tmux.secureSocket` | `boolean` | Store tmux socket under /run, which is more secure than /tmp, but as a downside it doesn't survive user logout. |
| `programs.tmux.shortcut` | `string` | Ctrl following by this key is used as the main shortcut. |
| `programs.tmux.terminal` | `string` | Set the $TERM variable. Use tmux-direct if italics or 24bit true color support is needed. |
| `programs.tmux.withUtempter` | `boolean` | Whether to enable libutempter for tmux. This is required so that tmux can write to /var/run/utmp (which can be queried with `who` to display currently connected user sessions). Note, this will add a guid wrapper for the group utmp! |
